domain: Andalusian flamenco compás 12-beat cycle (soleá + bulería + alegrías; 12-beat ¾+6/8 amalgamated rhythm; accents on beats 3,6,8,10,12; hemiola binary-articulated-as-ternary; headless silent beat 1; different palos vary entrance position)
specific_mechanism: COMPAS-NONUNIFORM-ALLOCATION: 12-cycle non-uniform per-position compute/attention budget allocation for transformer decoding. (1) Group tokens into 12-position rhythmic cycles. (2) Allocate decode-time budget non-uniformly: B(position) ∈ R^12, weighted heavier at {3,6,8,10,12} (accent), lighter at {1,2,4,5,7,9,11}. (3) Hemiola: dynamically choose binary 6+6 or ternary 4+4+4 articulation per cycle based on content-driven gate g_hemiola. (4) Headless skip: position-1 attention computation gated by silent-beat mask M₁=0. (5) Multi-palo entrance: cycle entrance position parameter p_entry varies per task type — soleá-mode (p_entry=1) for analytic tasks, bulería-mode (p_entry=12) for generative.
llm_application: COMPAS-NONUNIFORM-ALLOCATION 12-cycle non-uniform accent-position decode allocation + hemiola dynamic re-articulation + headless silent-beat gated skip + multi-palo cycle entrance. Differs from R402 TUVAN-IGIL (igil string spectral). R416 XALAM-FREQ (frequency band). R431 TAONGA-MICRO-BAND (micro-band). R440 TUVAN-PHANTOM-CHANNEL (phantom channel). R457 IMZAD-HARMONIC-BASIS (single-string overtone). R468 PIPA-4BAND (4-band pitch-bend RoPE). R279 PTCH (integer-ratio harmonic SVD). Differs from D-LLM NeurIPS 2024 (token adaptive compute allocation — closest, but no 12-cycle pattern + no hemiola + no headless). Non-Uniform KV Quant (different layer — bit allocation per outlier). Dynamic Cache Budget Allocation (different — KV cache not 12-cycle decode budget). Efficient LLM Inference Survey 2025 (umbrella). Differs by 12-CYCLE POSITIONAL ACCENT-WEIGHTED BUDGET + HEMIOLA BINARY-TERNARY DYNAMIC GATE + HEADLESS SILENT-BEAT POSITION-1 SKIP.
novelty_claim: D-LLM + Non-Uniform KV Quant + Dynamic Cache Budget cover non-uniform compute allocation paradigm. COMPAS-NONUNIFORM-ALLOCATION adds (a) 12-cycle position-pattern allocation + (b) hemiola dynamic binary-ternary re-articulation + (c) headless silent-beat gated skip. Recombination — borderline lookup.
